title: Take Action and Be Brave With Your Life
excerpt: Usually my work is all about positivity and joy and hope and love and light. But these past couple weeks, there have been some long-standing issues of injustice that have been brought front and center. As a POC, I stand…
body:
Usually my work is all about positivity and joy and hope and love and light. But these past couple weeks, there have been some long-standing issues of injustice that have been brought front and center. As a POC, I stand with the Black community in supporting the fight against racial injustice. I’m stepping up and being brave to use my voice for the things I believe in. I recognize that it’s not enough to say we are allies, but we must also take action to do our part. I have been listening and learning.

I want to continue to do my part. I have added brand new prints to the Digital Shop including the one above. 100% of the proceeds from all the prints in the shop from now through June 18 will be donated to the Black Lives Matter Global Network, the NAACP Legal Defense and Educational Fund and the Black Art Futures Fund. My company will also be matching donations up to $5000.

If you’re feeling inspired, I invite you to take a look through the new prints in the Digital Shop. 

What are some ways you’re doing your part? Please share in the comments below!
